summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of refactored App.js (4598 -> 1692 lines). All 15 features tested and working correctly. The major refactoring successfully extracted views into modular components while maintaining full functionality.

issues: Minor React warnings about unused variables in view components (non-blocking, cosmetic only)

passed_tests: 1. Login/Signup flow works - test@automl.com / Test1234! credentials work correctly
2. Forgot Password flow works - shows reset form with email input and 'Send Reset Link' button
3. Dashboard view loads correctly - shows empty state with 'No Dataset Uploaded Yet' or stats when models exist
4. Analysis view loads with sample data cards (Loan Approval, House Prices, Insurance Costs, Customer Churn, Customer Segmentation)
5. Sample dataset loading works - Loan Approval (20 rows x 5 cols) loads with Dataset Profile card
6. Target column selection works - 'approved' column selectable, algorithm selector shows Auto mode
7. Model training works - Logistic Regression achieves 100% accuracy on Loan Approval dataset
8. Training results display correctly - metrics cards, confusion matrix, feature importance chart, leaderboard
9. Predictions tab works - form inputs for age, income, credit_score, loan_amount; prediction result shows 'Predicted Class: 1'
10. Explainability tab works - SHAP Analysis shows Global Feature Importance chart with income as top feature
11. SHAP plain-English explanation works - 'The model relies most heavily on income and age to make its predictions about approved'
12. Data Explorer tab loads - shows 'No Data Loaded' with 'Go to Analysis' button when no data
13. Model Library tab works - shows models table or 'No Models Yet' state with Import Model option
14. History tab loads - shows saved analyses with timestamps, model info, and restore/delete options
15. Clusters/Unsupervised Learning works - Customer Segmentation dataset produces 3 clusters with detailed explanations
16. Dark mode toggle works - switches between light and dark themes correctly
17. Sidebar navigation works - all 7 main tabs (Dashboard, Analysis, Predictions, Explainability, Data Explorer, Model Library, History) accessible
18. Logout works - returns to auth page after clicking logout button
critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring successful: App.js reduced from 4598 to 1692 lines
View components properly extracted: DashboardView, AnalysisView, PredictView, ExplainabilityView, DataExplorerView, HistoryView, SmallViews (ClustersView, AnomaliesView, ModelsView)
React Context API (AppContext) properly shares state between components
All data-testid attributes preserved for testing
Minor: Some unused imports in view components (cosmetic, non-blocking)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user and sample datasets
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major refactoring of App.js completed and verified. All views extracted to /components/views/ directory. Key files: DashboardView.js, AnalysisView.js, PredictView.js, ExplainabilityView.js, DataExplorerView.js, HistoryView.js, SmallViews.js. State management via AppContext.js. Utility functions in /utils/ (mlEngine.js, datasetUtils.js, helpers.js). Constants in constants.js. All ML runs client-side in browser. Forgot password feature added to AuthPage.js with /api/auth/forgot-password and /api/auth/reset-password endpoints.

views.anomalies: PASS (visible in sidebar after target selection)
